title: lathyrus japonicus subsp. maritimus
intro: Lathyrus japonicus subsp. maritimus, commonly known as sea pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The sea pea is rich in nutrients and offers various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting bone health. In herbal preparations, the sea pea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
